LanguageData.Ammo_Magmagat_Buck.label: Magmagat shell (Buck)
LanguageData.Ammo_Magmagat_Buck.description: A single touch from this fiery will light all.

LanguageData.Ammo_Magmagat_Slug.description: A single touch from this fiery will light all.
LanguageData.Bullet_Magmagat_Buck.label: buckshot pellet
LanguageData.Bullet_Magmagat_Slug.label: Slug shot
